archive_summary.title: Project Costs
archive_summary.description: Complete cost breakdown with budget, per-service, and per-task details.

included_content.item: budget summary and per-task cost breakdown

section.title: Project Costs (Full Detail)
section.content:
Total budget: $100.00 Total spent: $48.69 Budget remaining: $51.31 Spent: 48.7%
### Cost Breakdown by Category
* annotator_sonnet_4_6: $19.77 * claude-haiku-4-5: $18.37 * annotator_haiku_4_5: $7.42 * judge_haiku_4_5: $3.08 * anthropic_api: $0.06
### Cost Breakdown by Service
* anthropic_api: $18.43
### Per-Task Costs
* t0001_brainstorm_results_1: $0.00 * t0002_literature_survey_granularity_conditioning: $0.00 * t0003_download_benchmark_subsets: $0.00 * t0004_brainstorm_results_2: $0.00 * t0005_hierarchical_annotation_pilot_v1: $0.06 * t0006_scope_aware_react_library: $0.00 * t0007_scope_unaware_planandsolve_library: $0.00 * t0008_brainstorm_results_3: $0.00 * t0009_hierarchical_annotation_v2: $9.10 * t0010_matched_mismatch_library: $0.00 * t0011_metric2_calibration_aggregator: $0.00 * t0012_phase2_abc_smoke_frontierscience: $18.37 * t0013_brainstorm_results_4: $0.00 * t0014_v2_annotator_sonnet_rerun: $21.16 * t0015_correct_proxy_benchmark_labels: $0.00 * t0016_brainstorm_results_5: $0.00
